Remarks/Remarques: Curve 55.00 was created for the 2023 review period because all 2023 measurements plotted >5% left of the previous curve 54.01. Curve 55.00 was built using 2023 open water measurements. The upper end of the curve was defined using high-water measurements from 2001 and 2012. The low end of the curve was defined using low-water measurements from September and October 2023. A breakpoint was added at 1.820m because this is an estimated elevation when a defined gravel shelf on the right bank is submerged, and all four bridge piers are in contact with the river. A transition zone surrounds the breakpoint that models the gradual transition between control segments when the gravel shelf is slowly being submerged by the river.
